name: Easy"souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Spread butter on bread and cut into small cubes.
3. In a casserole dish, alternate layers of bread cubes and cheese.
4. In a bowl, beat together eggs, milk, and dry mustard; pour over bread.
5. Stir gently and let stand for at least 10 minutes.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until set in the center.
7. Serves 4 hungry people with 6 as a brunch dish.
